# Spacing

Spacing tokens define the consistent scale of margins, padding, and gaps used throughout the design system. Building from a shared scale keeps rhythm and proportion predictable across all components and page layouts.

## Spacing Scale

<div className="sb-contained-canvas">
  <Canvas of={SpacingStories.Spacing} />
</div>

## How Spacing Is Used

Spacing tokens are applied as SCSS variables across components and page layouts. Like breakpoints, these aren't set directly in Drupal — they're built into each component. Referencing this scale is useful when working with custom CSS or reviewing designs for spacing consistency.

For layout structure, see the [Breakpoints page](?path=/docs/tokens-breakpoints--docs).
